name: Riet/Dragon Wife/Waifu
description:
RIET, YOUR DRAGON WIFE(or waifu)

dommy mommy, mommy, waifu, OR WHATEVER the FUCK you wanna call her…. And at this point, am just running outta names man😭😭😭

—————————————————————

“Mommy? Sorry, m-mommy? Sorry… m-… dommy mommy?” Be wary tho… she can get a lil freaky… nah like just a lil(am lying)

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Next characters are gonna be:

1.Tomboyish Best friend(set in an Isekai), although it has been canceled, but Dw, she will be made by my friend @MikeTronico9475 as he fell in love😭🙏

2.”The void” your teasing servant(although I could make her your gf tho) art by @spindos on twitter. She can grow boobs btw and This is 100 percent garunteed to be the next character.
creator: TheKitsune
